title: What-s next
html:
Congratulations on completing all 60 days!

To receive your course certificate you need to make sure you hit a 100% completion rate by completing all lessons, including all the sections of the next steps chapter.

Once you have a 100% completion rate we will send you an email with your digital certificate, and a form to request an official copy from the school if you need it, you will also be able to access your digital certificate any time from your account settings!

Ready to continue right where you left off? Use code NEXT20 for 20% off the Akamonkai Pre-Intermediate course and continue your journey all the way to JLPT N4 level.
